daily.today_energy: Your intuition is firing on all cylinders today, bestie. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your spiritual GPS. Channel that intense Scorpio energy into something creative or transformative.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing your energy from afar, and honestly, the universe is setting something up. Whether it's deepening a current connection or sparking something new, vulnerability hits different today.
daily.career: Your ability to see what others miss is your superpower right now. Speak up in that meeting or project—your perspective is exactly what's needed. Don't dim your light waiting for permission.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding today. That could be a walk, some stretching, or literally touching grass. You've got mad regenerative energy, so honor it by doing something that feels restorative.

weekly.overview: This week's energy invites you to shed what no longer serves. The cosmos is supporting deep transformation, so trust the process even if things feel messy. Your intuition is sharper than usual—listen to those gut feelings.
weekly.love: Someone might be trying to get your attention, but don't rush into anything. If you're coupled up, this is a great week for honest convos that actually go somewhere. Single? Focus on self-love first; the right person notices that glow.
weekly.career: Your natural magnetism is working overtime. Whether it's pitching an idea or collaborating with others, people are gravitating toward your energy. Use this momentum wisely—don't overcommit, but definitely don't play small.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for rest and release. Move in ways that feel good—dancing, stretching, swimming—anything that honors your need to process emotions physically. Mental wellness thrives when you're not pushing so hard.
